info.title: MICROSERVICE_DEV_Policy Management API
info.description: The Policy Management API enables businesses to efficiently create and configure various types of policies within their microservices architecture. This API allows users to define policy parameters, set rules, and establish guidelines for their implementation. Typical consumers include developers and system administrators who need to automate policy deployment and management processes. Leverage this API to ensure compliance and enhance operational governance across your services.

post.description: This endpoint allows you to create a new insurance policy in the system. Provide the necessary details in the request body to initiate the policy creation process.

requestBody.description: This request body is used to submit new policy information to the server. It must conform to the specified JSON schema defining the structure and required fields for a policy, ensuring that all necessary data is provided for successful policy creation.

200.description: Request completed successfully, and the resource has been returned.

404.description: The requested resource could not be found.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createPolicy-CreatePoli.title: Policy Response

policyId.description: The unique identifier for the policy.

customerId.description: The unique identifier for the customer associated with the policy.

policyType.description: The type of the insurance policy.

coverageAmount.description: The total coverage amount provided by the policy.

premiumAmount.description: The amount to be paid for the policy premium.

status.description: The current status of the policy (e.g., active, inactive).

startDate.description: The start date of the policy coverage.

endDate.description: The end date of the policy coverage.

message.description: A message providing additional information about the policy.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createPolicy-CreatePoli.description: This schema represents the details of a policy response returned by the policy operations POST request.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createPolicy-CreatePoli.title: Policy Creation Request

customerId.description: The unique identifier for the customer enrolling in the policy.

policyType.description: The type of insurance policy being created.

coverageAmount.description: The total coverage amount provided by the policy.

premiumAmount.description: The amount of money to be paid for the insurance policy.

startDate.description: The date when the insurance policy becomes effective.

endDate.description: The date when the insurance policy expires.

beneficiaryName.description: The name of the person who will benefit from the policy.

paymentMode.description: The method of payment for the policy (e.g., monthly, annually).

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createPolicy-CreatePoli.description: Schema representing the request body for creating a new insurance policy.

timestamp.description: The timestamp when the error occurred.

status.description: The HTTP status indicating the outcome of the operation.

error.description: A brief description of the error.

message.description: A user-friendly message providing additional details about the error.
message.example: Customer details not found for policy creation.

path.description: The path used in the request that resulted in the error.

trace.description: A trace of the request which could help in debugging.

details.description: Additional details providing context about the error.

suggestion.description: A suggestion for the user to rectify the issue.
suggestion.example: Verify customer details and retry the policy creation request.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createPolicy-CreatePoli.description: Schema representing the response structure for a 404 error in POST operations related to policies.

example.message: Customer details not found for policy creation.

details.message: No registered customer profile exists for the provided customer ID.

example.suggestion: Verify customer details and retry the policy creation request.

customerId.description: The ID of the customer associated with the request.

errorCode.description: A specific code representing the error type.

message.description: Message providing detailed explanation of the error.
message.example: No policy exists with the provided ID.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createPolicy-ErrorDetai.description: Contains detailed information about the error that occurred.

environment.name: environment
environment.description: Environment used to select the workflow branch.

serviceCategory.name: serviceCategory
serviceCategory.description: Service category used to select the workflow branch.
